title: ruilopezia hanburyana
intro: Ruilopezia hanburyana is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, particularly in Mexico and Costa Rica. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The plant's extracts have been shown to have several health benefits, including antimicrobial and antioxidant activities, which can help protect against infections and oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Ruilopezia hanburyana is often used as an infusion or tincture, typically combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects and promote respiratory health.
